title: astragalus kaufmannii subsp. atratus
intro: Astragalus kaufmannii subsp. atratus is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to enhance immune function and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Astragalus kaufmannii subsp. atratus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus kaufmannii subsp. atratus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and tea infusions, which are available in health food stores and online.
